Account.Name: Operating Checking
Account.Description: General church operating account (all ministries). Outreach committee funds are a designated subset.

Account.Name: Designated Giving
Account.Description: Outreach giving recorded in the manual ledger (gross). Reconciled to Stripe settlement net at reporting.

Account.Name: Event Registration Income
Account.Description: Registration income for community meals and workshops.

Account.Name: Supplies & Materials
Account.Description: Program supplies. Includes a $300.00 Hamilton Community Hall venue charge booked here pending review (see Venue Hire and Xero).

Account.Name: Printing & Reproduction
Account.Description: Flyers, banners, and printed outreach materials.

Account.Name: Meals & Events
Account.Description: Catering and food costs for community meals and workshops.

Account.Name: Volunteer Reimbursements
Account.Description: Mileage and materials reimbursements to volunteers. Two items still uncleared.

Account.Name: Venue Hire
Account.Description: Correct account for hall and venue rental. The spring retreat hall charge is currently miscategorized under Supplies & Materials.

Account.Name: Accounts Payable
Account.Description: Outstanding volunteer reimbursement bills not yet cleared.

Account.Name: Net Assets
Account.Description: Accumulated net assets for the outreach fund.
